revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

{{DEFAULTSORT:よしたしちふくしん}} [[Category:豊橋市]] [[Category:名数|7よした]]

'''吉田七福神'''（よしだしちふくじん）は、[[愛知県]][[豊橋市]]にある[[七福神]]の[[巡礼]][[札所]]。[[達磨大師]]の日進院を加え8か所の寺により構成されている。
== 概要 == *エリア：全て[[豊橋市]] *期間：通年
== 七福神の所在 == *[[神宮寺 (豊橋市)|神宮寺]] - [[えびす|恵比須]] *[[普門寺 (豊橋市)|普門寺]] - [[大黒天]] *宝形院 - [[福禄寿]] *[[赤岩寺]] - [[弁才天]] *[[永福寺]] - [[毘沙門天]] *常心寺 - [[布袋尊]] *薬師寺 - [[寿老人]] *日進院 - [[達磨大師]]
== 関連項目 == *[[三河七福神]]
==外部リンク== *[http://www.gld.mmtr.or.jp/~yuchan/etc/yoshida7fuku.html 参考サイト]

'''吉田七福神'''（よしだしちふくじん）は、[[愛知県]][[豊橋市]]にある[[七福神]]の[[巡礼]][[札所]]。平成9年（[[1997年]]）開創。[[達磨大師]]の[[日進院]]を加え8か所の寺により構成されている。

== 七福神の所在 == *[[神宮寺 (豊橋市)|神宮寺]]（豊橋市魚町） - [[えびす|恵比須]] *[[普門寺 (豊橋市)|普門寺]]（同市雲谷町ナベ山下） - [[大黒天]] *宝形院（同市向山町字南中畑） - [[福禄寿]] *[[赤岩寺]]（同市多米町字赤岩山） - [[弁才天]] *[[永福寺]]（同市下地町字北村） - [[毘沙門天]] *常心寺（同市杉山町字天津） - [[布袋尊]] *薬師寺（同市牛川薬師町） - [[寿老人]] *[[日進院]]（同市新吉町） - [[達磨大師]]
== 関連項目 == *[[三河七福神]]
==外部リンク== *[http://www.gld.mmtr.or.jp/~yuchan/etc/yoshida7fuku.html 参考サイト]

== 吉田七福神の一覧 == *[[神宮寺 (豊橋市)|神宮寺]]（豊橋市魚町） - [[えびす|恵比須]] *[[普門寺 (豊橋市)|普門寺]]（同市雲谷町ナベ山下） - [[大黒天]] *[[宝形院]]（同市向山町字南中畑） - [[福禄寿]] *[[赤岩寺]]（同市多米町字赤岩山） - [[弁才天]] *[[永福寺]]（同市下地町字北村） - [[毘沙門天]] *[[常心寺]]（同市杉山町字天津） - [[布袋]] *[[薬師寺 (豊橋市)|薬師寺]]（同市牛川薬師町） - [[寿老人]] *[[豊橋閣日進禅寺]]（同市新吉町） - [[達磨]]大師
== 関連項目 == *[[三河七福神]] *[[吉田三ヶ寺]]
== 外部リンク == *[http://www.gld.mmtr.or.jp/~yuchan/etc/yoshida7fuku.html 参考サイト]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:吉田七福神]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11413553]]
Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:33, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Source Notation|date=January 2013}}
'''Yoshida Shichifukujin''' (吉田七福神) is a pilgrimage [[:en:Seven Lucky Gods|Seven Lucky Gods]] {{ill|pilgrimage site|ja|札所|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/pilgrimage site|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巡礼|1=pilgrimage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1644573}} located in [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]] [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]. It was established in Heisei 9 ([[:en:1997|1997]]). It is composed of eight temples, including the {{ill|Daruma Daishi|ja|達磨大師|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daruma Daishi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 達磨|1=Bodhidharma|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187172}}’s Toyohashi-kaku {{ill|Nisshin-in|ja|日進院|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nisshin-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊橋閣日進禅寺|1=Hōkyōkaku nisshinzen-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11633882}}.

== Overview ==
* Area: Entirely within [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]
* Operating Period: Year-round

== List of Yoshida Shichifukujin ==
* {{ill|Jingūji (Toyohashi)|ja|神宮寺 (豊橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingūji (Toyohashi)|qq=|1=Jingû-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11589483}} (located in Uomachi, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – {{ill|Ebisu|ja|恵比須|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to えびす (曖昧さ回避)}}
* {{ill|Fumonji (Toyohashi)|ja|普門寺 (豊橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonji (Toyohashi)|qq=|1=Fumon-ji Temple (Toyohashi, Aichi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514633}} (located in Nabeyamashita, Unya-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Daikokuten|Daikokuten]]
* {{ill|Hōgyōin|ja|宝形院|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōgyōin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Minamichūhata, Mukayama-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Fukurokuju|Fukurokuju]]
* {{ill|Akaiwa-ji|ja|赤岩寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akaiwa-ji|qq=|1=Sekiganji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635539}} (located in Aka-iwayama, Tome-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Benzaiten|Benzaiten]]
* {{ill|Eifuku-ji (Toyohashi-Shimojicho)|ja|永福寺 (豊橋市下地町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eifuku-ji (Toyohashi-Shimojicho)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Kitamura, Shimojicho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Vaiśravaṇa|Bishamonten]]
* {{ill|Jōshin-ji|ja|常心寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōshin-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Amatsuhashi, Sugiyama-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Budai|Hotei]]
* {{ill|Yakushi-ji (Toyohashi)|ja|薬師寺 (豊橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushi-ji (Toyohashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Ushikawa Yakushi-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Jurōjin|Jurojin]]
* {{ill|Toyohashi-kaku Nisshin Zen-ji|ja|豊橋閣日進禅寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyohashi-kaku Nisshin Zen-ji|qq=|1=Hōkyōkaku nisshinzen-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11633882}} (located in Shinyoshi-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Bodhidharma|Daruma Daishi]] Daisi

== Related Articles ==
* {{ill|Mikawa Seven Lucky Gods|ja|三河七福神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikawa Seven Lucky Gods|qq=}}
* [[:en:Seven Lucky Gods|Seven Lucky Gods]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11413553]]
Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:33, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Source Notation|date=January 2013}}
'''Yoshida Shichifukujin''' (吉田七福神) is a pilgrimage [[:en:Seven Lucky Gods|Seven Lucky Gods]] {{ill|pilgrimage site|ja|札所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/pilgrimage site|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巡礼|1=pilgrimage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1644573}} located in [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]] [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]. It was established in Heisei 9 ([[:en:1997|1997]]). It is composed of eight temples, including the {{ill|Daruma Daishi|ja|達磨大師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daruma Daishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 達磨|1=Bodhidharma|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187172}}’s Toyohashi-kaku {{ill|Nisshin-in|ja|日進院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nisshin-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊橋閣日進禅寺|1=Hōkyōkaku nisshinzen-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11633882}}.

== Overview ==
* Area: Entirely within [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]
* Operating Period: Year-round

== List of Yoshida Shichifukujin ==
* {{ill|Jingūji (Toyohashi)|ja|神宮寺 (豊橋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jingūji (Toyohashi)|1=Jingû-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11589483}} (located in Uomachi, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – {{ill|Ebisu|ja|恵比須|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to えびす (曖昧さ回避)}}
* {{ill|Fumonji (Toyohashi)|ja|普門寺 (豊橋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonji (Toyohashi)|1=Fumon-ji Temple (Toyohashi, Aichi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514633}} (located in Nabeyamashita, Unya-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Daikokuten|Daikokuten]]
* {{ill|Hōgyōin|ja|宝形院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōgyōin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Minamichūhata, Mukayama-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Fukurokuju|Fukurokuju]]
* {{ill|Akaiwa-ji|ja|赤岩寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akaiwa-ji|1=Sekiganji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635539}} (located in Aka-iwayama, Tome-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Benzaiten|Benzaiten]]
* {{ill|Eifuku-ji (Toyohashi-Shimojicho)|ja|永福寺 (豊橋市下地町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eifuku-ji (Toyohashi-Shimojicho)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Kitamura, Shimojicho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Vaiśravaṇa|Bishamonten]]
* {{ill|Jōshin-ji|ja|常心寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōshin-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Amatsuhashi, Sugiyama-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Budai|Hotei]]
* {{ill|Yakushi-ji (Toyohashi)|ja|薬師寺 (豊橋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushi-ji (Toyohashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Ushikawa Yakushi-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Jurōjin|Jurojin]]
* {{ill|Toyohashi-kaku Nisshin Zen-ji|ja|豊橋閣日進禅寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyohashi-kaku Nisshin Zen-ji|1=Hōkyōkaku nisshinzen-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11633882}} (located in Shinyoshi-cho, [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]]) – [[:en:Bodhidharma|Daruma Daishi]] Daisi

== Related Articles ==
* {{ill|Mikawa Seven Lucky Gods|ja|三河七福神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikawa Seven Lucky Gods|qq=}}

It was established in Heisei 9 ({{ill|1997|en|1997|WD=Q2088|lt=1997}}). It is composed of eight temples, including the {{ill|Daruma Daishi|ja|達磨大師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daruma Daishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 達磨|1=Bodhidharma|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187172}}’s Toyohashi-kaku {{ill|Nisshin-in|ja|日進院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nisshin-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊橋閣日進禅寺|1=Hōkyōkaku nisshinzen-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11633882}}.

* {{ill|Akaiwa-ji|ja|赤岩寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akaiwa-ji|1=Sekiganji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635539}} (located in Aka-iwayama, Tome-cho, {{ill|Toyohashi|en|Toyohashi|WD=Q336431|lt=Toyohashi City}}) – {{ill|Benzaiten|en|Benzaiten|WD=Q818468|lt=Benzaiten}}

It is composed of eight temples, including the {{ill|Daruma Daishi|ja|達磨大師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daruma Daishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 達磨|1=Bodhidharma|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187172}}’s Toyohashi-kaku {{ill|Nisshin-in|ja|日進院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nisshin-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊橋閣日進禅寺|1=Hōkyōkaku nisshinzen-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11633882}}.

It is composed of eight temples, including the {{ill|Daruma Daishi|ja|達磨大師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daruma Daishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 達磨|1=Bodhidharma|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187172}}’s Toyohashi-kaku {{ill|Nisshin-in|ja|日進院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nisshin-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊橋閣日進禅寺|1=Hōkyōkaku nisshinzen-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11633882}}.

== Overview ==
* Area: Entirely within {{ill|Toyohashi|en|Toyohashi|WD=Q336431|lt=Toyohashi City|1=Toyohashi}}
* Operating Period: Year-round
